top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.colour = 'Blue' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_blue_female
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
JOIN colour c ON s.skin_colour_id = c.id
WHERE g.gender = 'Female';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.colour = 'Blue' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_blue_female
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
JOIN colour c ON s.skin_colour_id = c.id
WHERE g.gender = 'Female';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.colour = 'Blue' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_blue_female
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id
WHERE g.gender = 'Female';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.colour = 'Blue' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_blue_female
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id
WHERE g.gender = 'Female';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.colour = 'Blue' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_blue_female
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
JOIN colour c ON s.skin_colour_id = c.id
WHERE g.gender = 'Female';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.colour = 'Blue' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_blue_female
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id
WHERE g.gender = 'Female';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.colour = 'Blue' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_blue_female
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
JOIN colour c ON s.eye_colour_id = c.id
WHERE g.gender = 'Female';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.colour = 'Blue' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_blue_female
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
JOIN colour c ON s.skin_colour_id = c.id
WHERE g.gender = 'Female';
